title: TNSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: The Tamil Nadu State Apex Cooperative Bank Ltd.
short_info: The Tamil Nadu State Apex Cooperative Bank Ltd. has released the official Cooperative Intern Notification 2026 on 19-05-2026 at TNSC Bank Official Website. A total of 05 vacancies have been announced under the TNSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 to 30 years with an MBA or equivalent qualification in Marketing Management, Cooperative Management, Agri Business Management, or Rural Development Management along with computer proficiency can apply online from 19-05-2026 to 31-05-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are availa

qualification.details: Academic Qualification: | MBA or equivalent in Marketing Management / Cooperative Management / Agri Business Management / Rural Development Management. | Essential Qualification: | Proficiency in Computer Applications. | Age Limit: | Minimum 21 years and Maximum 30 years (as on the date of advertisement).

selection_process: Selection is based on weightage of marks as follows:
Shortlisted candidates will be called for Interview.

Coordinate with Primary Agricultural Credit Societies (PACS) and other primary cooperatives. Provide guidance for implementation of Ministry of Cooperation initiatives. Solve day-to-day problems related to computerization
and approvals. Prepare and share weekly status reports.
how_to_apply: Fill the online application form carefully.
Upload required documents and submit before the last date.
Applications received through post, courier, or email will not be accepted.
Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview.
important_instructions: No right or claim for regular appointment after internship. Interns can avail 10 days Casual Leave only. Maintain confidentiality of Bank documents and information. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. The Bank reserves the right to terminate the internship at any time without assigning reasons.

faq.question: Q1. What is TNSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: TNSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026 is a one‑year internship programme launched by The Tamil Nadu State Apex Cooperative Bank Ltd. The aim is to strengthen the cooperative movement at the grassroots level by placing Cooperative Interns in selected District Central Cooperative Banks.

faq.question: Q2. How many Cooperative Intern vacancies are available and where will interns be posted?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 Cooperative Intern vacancies in this recruitment. Selected candidates will be placed in the District Central Cooperative Banks at Erode, Kancheepuram, Madurai, Nilgiris and Thanjavur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the tenure and salary for TNSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026?
faq.answer: The tenure of the Cooperative Internship is 1 year, which may be extended based on performance and requirement. Each intern will receive a fixed monthly remuneration of ₹25,000 during the internship period.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for TNSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBA or equivalent degree in Marketing Management, Cooperative Management, Agri Business Management or Rural Development Management. In addition, proficiency in computer applications is essential for all applicants.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for TNSC Bank Cooperative Intern 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age for applying is 21 years and the maximum age is 30 years. The age is to be calculated as on the date of publication of the advertisement.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for TNSC Bank Cooperative Intern Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on weightage of marks obtained in academic qualifications and additional cooperative/computer qualifications. Shortlisted candidates, based on this weightage, will be called for an interview before final selection.

faq.question: Q7. How is the merit/weightage calculated for TNSC Bank Cooperative Intern selection?
faq.answer: Weightage is given as follows: 5% for 10th Standard, 15% for Higher Secondary, 25% for Graduation and 40% for Post Graduation. Additional 5% weightage each is given to candidates having Cooperative Management qualification and Computer Education.
